reasoning: Our focus is on improving lactate clearance, addressing the 9.3% power drop from your 5-min to 20-min efforts. This difference indicates low fatigue resistance and a need to build a stronger aerobic base. The last ride showed solid base endurance at 71% FTP, now we target controlled intensity to enhance your ability to maintain steady power on the Alpine Loop's climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform four sets of 10 minutes: 2 minutes at 242-256W followed by 3 minutes at 209-223W, repeat twice per set with 5 minutes of recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
